typography.pairing_descriptor: modern geometric display + clean humanist sans-serif, professional yet friendly

imagery.composition: clean backgrounds, generous whitespace, centered elements, subtle gradients

target_audience.profession: professionals, small business owners, freelancers, students in German-speaking markets
pain_points: need to convert/merge PDFs quickly without installing software
worried about data security when using online tools
frustrated by slow or ad-heavy free PDF tools
need GDPR-compliant solution for business documents
aspirations: handle document tasks instantly without disrupting workflow
trust that sensitive documents are safe
have one reliable tool for all PDF needs
look professional with properly formatted documents
